summary: Created unified backpressure validation script with CLI interface. Supports build slugs and path-based validation. Runs pytest, ruff (with flake8 fallback), and mypy validators. Returns structured JSON output with PASS/WARN/FAIL status. Exit codes: 0=PASS, 1=WARN, 2=FAIL. Gracefully skips missing validators. Supports per-build config overrides via backpressure.yaml in build folders.
notes_for_orchestrator: Tested on ralph-learnings build and N5/scripts. Installed ruff during testing (was not previously installed). The script properly handles missing validators, missing test files, and produces valid JSON output. Per-build config override mechanism is implemented but no builds currently have local backpressure.yaml files.
